productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Pack of 3 Black Socks
description: Style Note Soft socks not only improve the condition of your feet, but also are an absolute essential for your comfort. Wear these versatile socks with your formal shoes or trainers for a soft cushiony bed for your feet. Product Details Pack of 3 in black Black calf length socks with white stripes at the opening Small rib at opening to grip below ankle with branding under it Material and Care 80% cotton, 16% nylon and 4% lycra Machine wash in warm water with like colours Do not iron or bleach Tumble dry low
